content_body: We rented both Outlaw Ridge and Riverview Lodge for our family gathering. Both houses are spacious with 5 master bedrooms each. We had a fabulous time in the game rooms, TV rooms, and taking advantage of the access to the Tocca River. (We brought our own tubes and rafts!) Plus, we used the fire pit each night! The houses offer high end furnishing and bedding—each family member was thrilled! We will cherish our time at these 'cabins' and hope to return soon!
title: Fantastic Time!
